control_card.C: Deterministic stdlib Python emitter with dataclass rows, validate(), main(), JSON, CSV, and Markdown artifacts.
control_card.F: No Clay promotion; no closed AxialMonotonicityOfSwirlProfile; no Sturmian 1D zero-number principle is claimed for the coupled axisymmetric system.
control_card.G: Validation succeeds only when SecondaryPeakExclusion is not proved, the blocker remains open, and Clay promotion is false.
control_card.L: Sprint137 local barrier support -> secondary shoulder failure mode -> required exclusion theorem remains absent.
control_card.P: Use this artifact as the fail-closed Sprint138 ledger for the secondary-peak blocker; do not use it as a proof of axial monotonicity.
control_card.R: Analyze SecondaryPeakExclusion as Sprint138 blocker 2 for AxialMonotonicityOfSwirlProfile and keep the decision fail-closed.
control_card.S: Single-peak initial data and parabolic smoothing are recorded, but nonlinear source terms, annular Gamma/u1 mismatch, and the absence of a coupled zero-number theorem leave secondary positive-v crossings possible.

gamma_maximum_principle: D_t Gamma = nu(Delta - 2 r^-1 partial_r) Gamma, so Gamma has a maximum principle, but this controls circulation amplitude rather than the one-dimensional axial peak count of u1 or v.
u1_equation: D_t u1 = 2 u1 partial_z psi1 + nu Ltilde u1
v_barrier_equation: D_t v = nu Ltilde v + 2 v partial_z psi1 + 2 u1 partial_z^2 psi1 - (partial_z u^r) partial_r u1 - (partial_z u^z) v
